title: Redstonerite Gear
description: Very powerfull hybrid gears for you!
body:
Very powerfull hybrid equipments for you!

This mod adds super powerful gear to the game, made of a netherite-iron hybrid material that is enhanced with Minecraft's redstone element.

You have to collect a lot of materials, but don't give up, because eventually you will get super powerful gear!

These gears are so good that you can easily survive the night without casting any spells and kill Wither/Ender Dragon Bosses!

The mod is currently in beta due to a lack of content in an API, and the armors do not have special powers. The armors will return in a better way when the API is updated.
